raw_sql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
  COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / 3600)::numeric, 2) AS avg_resolution_hours,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / 3600)::numeric, 2) AS median_resolution_hours
FROM flag_2
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
ORDER BY month;
template:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
  COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / ?n)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_resolution_hours,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(?n) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / ?n)::numeric, ?n) AS median_resolution_hours
FROM flag_2
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)
ORDER BY month;

predicates: ((closed_at IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL))

raw_sql:

  priority,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
  COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / 3600)::numeric, 2) AS avg_resolution_hours
FROM flag_2
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY priority, DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
ORDER BY priority, month;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / 3600, 2) AS resolution_hours,
  COUNT(*) AS frequency
FROM flag_2
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY resolution_hours
ORDER BY frequency DESC
LIMIT 20;
template:

  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / ?n, ?n) AS resolution_hours,
  COUNT(*) AS frequency
FROM flag_2
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY resolution_hours
ORDER BY frequency DESC
LIMIT ?n;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', closed_at) AS close_month,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS open_month,
  COUNT(*) AS count,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / 3600)::numeric, 2) AS avg_hours
FROM flag_2
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', closed_at), DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
ORDER BY close_month, open_month;
template:

  DATE_TRUNC(?s, closed_at) AS close_month,
  DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS open_month,
  COUNT(*) AS count,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / ?n)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_hours
FROM flag_2
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC(?s, closed_at), DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)
ORDER BY close_month, open_month;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  category,
  assignment_group,
  COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / 3600)::numeric, 2) AS avg_resolution_hours,
  MIN(DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)) AS first_month,
  MAX(DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)) AS last_month
FROM flag_2
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY category, assignment_group
ORDER BY avg_resolution_hours DESC;
template:
SELECT
  category,
  assignment_group,
  COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / ?n)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_resolution_hours,
  MIN(DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)) AS first_month,
  MAX(DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)) AS last_month
FROM flag_2
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY category, assignment_group
ORDER BY avg_resolution_hours DESC;

predicates: ((closed_at IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL))

raw_sql:

  DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS open_month,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', closed_at) AS close_month,
  COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / 3600)::numeric, 2) AS avg_resolution_hours
FROM flag_2
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at), DATE_TRUNC('month', closed_at)
ORDER BY open_month, close_month;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('week', closed_at) AS close_week,
  COUNT(*) AS closed_count,
  MIN(closed_at) AS earliest_close,
  MAX(closed_at) AS latest_close
FROM flag_2
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', closed_at)
ORDER BY close_week;
template:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC(?s, closed_at) AS close_week,
  COUNT(*) AS closed_count,
  MIN(closed_at) AS earliest_close,
  MAX(closed_at) AS latest_close
FROM flag_2
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC(?s, closed_at)
ORDER BY close_week;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  opened_at,
  closed_at,
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / 3600::numeric, 2) AS resolution_hours,
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (opened_at - LAG(opened_at) OVER (ORDER BY opened_at))) / 3600::numeric, 2) AS hours_since_prev_open
FROM flag_2
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY opened_at
LIMIT 30;
template:

  opened_at,

FROM flag_2
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY opened_at
LIMIT ?n;

predicates: ((closed_at IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL))
